windows.title: ClaudeMon — Monitor your Claude Code sessions

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.claudemon.com wss://api.claudemon.com ws://localhost:* https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https://avatars.githubusercontent.com
